data/maps/FortreeCity_DecorationShop/tex.FortreeCity_DecorationShop_Text_Merchand: Merchandise you buy here is sent to\nyour own PC.\pThat's fantastic! I wish they could\nalso deliver me home like that.
data/maps/FortreeCity_DecorationShop/tex.FortreeCity_DecorationShop_Text_BuyingDe: I'm buying a pretty desk and I'm\nputting my cute DOLLS on it.\pIf I don't, when I decorate my\nSECRET BASE, my DOLLS will get\ldirty or poked with splinters.
